category_sources: Official SCIP homepage describes it as a solver and framework for constraint integer programming, MIP, and MINLP.
source_facts.description says it is a solver for mixed integer programming and mixed integer nonlinear programming.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses the display name SCIP.
docs_sources: Official homepage links online documentation for code and getting started.
source_facts.homepage is the official SCIP Optimization Suite website.
repo_sources: GitHub README states the original instance is hosted at git.zib.de and the GitHub repository is a read-only mirror, so confidence is medium for official source-control URL.
source_facts.repo is empty; official SCIP homepage links public GitHub mirrors under scipopt, including SCIP.
tags_sources: Official SCIP site describes constraint integer programming and branch-cut-and-price.
source_facts.description identifies MIP and MINLP solving.
